name: LED Light Module – 1.5W/110V – IP65 – 100pcs Set
description: ZION LED USA Light Module Epistar are excellent for illuminating signs or outlining windows. Anyone can install these with ease because they wire directly into a standard 110V outlet with no driver required. These lights are safe for outdoor use and protected from rain, snow, and weak jets of water, such as sprinklers. LED Modules are perfect for gas stations, grocery stores, and shopping centers.
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 1.5W/module Brightness: 390 lm/module Colors: Cool White, Warm White, Red, Green, Blue Voltage: 110V / 220V Power Factor: ≥ 0.9 Efficacy: 130 lm/W CRI: 90+ Viewing Angle: 160° Dimmable: Yes Temp Range: -20°C to 60°C Material: Aluminum & PC Housing Color: White / Clear Lens: Clear Waterproof: IP68 Certification: UL Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 3 Years Length: 48 ft
